python-fastapi.name: Python + FastAPI
python-fastapi.dirs:
src/models/       → pure domain classes (no I/O)
src/repositories/ → data access via storage.py
src/storage.py    → load(entity)/save(entity, records) with atomic writes
src/auth.py       → JWT + bcrypt
src/api.py        → FastAPI routes with /api/v1/ prefix
src/main.py       → uvicorn entrypoint
data/             → JSON persistence files (gitignored)
python-fastapi.conventions:
- Python 3.9+. Always use python3, never python.
- Type hints on public functions. Docstrings on classes.
- Models: constructor validates invariants, raises ValueError. to_dict()/from_dict().
- Repositories: find_all(), find_by_id(id) → None if not found, save_one(obj), delete(id) → bool.
- API: /api/v1/ prefix, errors as {"detail": "msg"}, status codes 200/201/400/401/403/404/409.
- Tests: tests/test_<module>.py, pytest + FastAPI TestClient, do not mock storage (use tmp_path).

react-tailwind.name: React 18 + Tailwind CSS
react-tailwind.dirs:
frontend/src/components/ → reusable UI components (.jsx/.tsx)
frontend/src/pages/      → route-level components
frontend/src/hooks/      → custom React hooks
frontend/src/api/        → fetch/axios service modules
frontend/src/context/    → React Context providers
react-tailwind.conventions:
- React 18 functional components + hooks.
- State: useState/useReducer + Context for global state.
- Styling: Tailwind utility classes only (no inline styles).
- Bundler: Vite. Run with: npm run dev.

none.name: No frontend (API only)
none.dirs: N/A — pure backend API project, no frontend code.
none.conventions: No frontend. Focus entirely on the backend API and its tests.

json.name: JSON files
json.notes:
Flat JSON files in data/ with atomic writes.
Use storage.load(entity) / storage.save(entity, records).
No migrations needed.

playwright.name: Playwright (Python / pytest-playwright)
playwright.notes:
Use page.wait_for_selector() not time.sleep().
Screenshots via page.screenshot(path='tests/screenshots/...').
Requires: pip install pytest-playwright playwright && playwright install chromium.

playwright-node.name: Playwright (Node / @playwright/test)
playwright-node.notes:
Use page.waitForSelector() not arbitrary sleeps.
Screenshots via page.screenshot({ path: 'tests/screenshots/...' }) or the built-in --screenshot=only-on-failure reporter output.
Requires: npm install -D @playwright/test && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium.
If the project has its own e2e/playwright.config.ts, run_cmd should include --config pointing at it instead of relying on defaults.

none.name: No E2E tests
none.notes: E2E testing disabled for this project.
